title: SingleBranchMode flag derived from config
definition_of_done: Materialize engine SingleBranchMode is set based on config.Mode instead of hardcoded true. In dual-branch mode, done does not auto-promote to merged.
outcome: Materialize engine SingleBranchMode flag derived from appCtx.Mode via feat(mode) commit. In dual-branch mode, done does not auto-promote to merged.
